task_objective: Merge the QAM UI cleanup branch to main, start a new branch, reduce duplicate first-load Ludusavi probes, downgrade no-context QAM selection misses from warning to debug, and reduce warmed QAM mount work.
design_decisions: Cache Ludusavi adapter versions after diagnostics so the first versions RPC reuses the existing --version probe.
Reuse the diagnostics config path for config marker mtime checks so first load does not run config path twice.
Keep warning-level QAM no-match logs only for real sessions that fail matching; no session context is expected and logs at debug.
Cache successful Ludusavi launcher discovery while preserving retry behavior when discovery fails.
Use a lightweight backend cache-current RPC on warmed frontend loads before skipping refresh_games.
Fetch plugin logs only when the log modal opens or after operations that already refresh logs.
Drop the immediate qam_open_retry_0 retry and suppress no-op scroll reset logs.
results: Fast-forwarded main through feat/qam-ui-cleanup and created fix/first-load-probe-cleanup.
Focused red tests failed before implementation and passed after implementation.
Warmed QAM mount work now avoids repeated launcher discovery, log fetches, no-op scroll logging, and refresh_games when backend cache markers are current.
